# Nurtured Nest

> Where Birth Feels Safe — Professional birth doula services in Toronto, Canada.

Nurtured Nest is a doula and birth support practice founded by Varshitha, serving families across the Greater Toronto Area. We provide personalized, evidence-based support through pregnancy, labour, and the postpartum period.

## Services

- [Prenatal Guidance](/): Birth plan strategy, nutritional counseling, movement & breathwork
- [Labour Doula Care](/): Continuous labour presence, partner coaching, pain management tools
- [Postpartum Support](/): Newborn care education, lactation support, emotional recovery

## Contact

- Phone: 226-975-9978
- Email: nurturednestca@gmail.com
- Location: Toronto, Ontario, Canada (serving Greater Toronto Area)
- Website: https://nurturednest.ca
- Free 20-minute introductory consultation available

## About

Varshitha is a certified professional birth doula with training in evidence-based doula care and a background in maternal wellness. She founded Nurtured Nest to create a sanctuary where modern parents feel fully supported, seen, and safe.
